blocks.text: Picking up the timing so nothing slips. The window I am holding stays open through the end of the month, but I need a confirmed date from your side to lock the outreach schedule around it, and the sooner the better, since the list build keys off it.

On the pieces that feed the date: Laura Bradley has a first draft of the key messages nearly ready, and Kimberly Le should have the coverage read wrapped this week. Once those two are in hand we can put a realistic announcement date in front of you instead of a guess.

So the thing I owe you is a proposed date, and the thing I need back is the name of your final approver on the materials. Send that over and I will make sure sign-off is not what holds up the {{fact:f:E-2022-001.client}} announcement.
